subtasks.title: Setup & Project Foundation
subtasks.description: Set up Electron, Vite, React TS, and Vitest. Configure main/preload IPC. Establish the folder structure for game logic, UI, and types. Ensure pnpm dev/build/test works.

subtasks.title: Game Engine: Core Logic
subtasks.description: Implement pure TS logic for game state, board generation (19 hexes, tokens, desert, harbors), and core rules (placements, dice roll, resource distribution). Write unit tests for generation and validation.

subtasks.title: Game Engine: Advanced Mechanics & Bots
subtasks.description: Extend engine with Robber (discard, move, steal), Trading (Bank/Harbor/Player), Dev Cards (Knight, VP, etc.), Scoring (Longest Road, Largest Army, 10VP win), and basic bot logic for 3-4 players. Write tests for all mechanics.

subtasks.title: UI Layer: Interactive Board & Controls
subtasks.description: Build React components for the interactive Catan board (Hex, Edge, Intersection) and player dashboard (Resources, Actions, Trade UI, Event Log). Wire UI to the Game Engine via custom hooks.

subtasks.title: Persistence & Finalization
subtasks.description: Implement game persistence (Save/Load/Resume) via Electron IPC. Final polish on UI/UX, error handling, and documentation. Ensure all tests, linting, and typechecks pass.
